channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: Pi Network’s Big July Upgrade Explained: What Pioneers Need to Know
item.description: We will also take a look at PI's latest price performance in this article, which has been quite underwhelming....
item.dc:creator: CryptoPotato

item.title: Microsoft patches RoguePlanet Defender zero-day vulnerability
item.description: Microsoft has released a security patch to address a Defender zero-day vulnerability known as "RoguePlanet," disclosed after the June 2026 Patch Tuesday. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: ‘Summer of Ethereum Love’ Gaining Steam, Says Lubin, But When Will ETH Price Follow?
item.description: Ethereum advocates are confident that the fundamentals are bullish, but investors in the asset remain extremely bearish....
item.dc:creator: CryptoPotato

item.title: Top AI Agents Built to Catch Malicious Code Can Be Tricked Into Running It
item.description:
Ask an AI coding agent to scan open-source code for security holes, and it might run the attacker's code on your own machine instead.
That is the finding in a proof-of-concept published Wednesday by ...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.description: XRP defended the $1.00-$1.05 support zone, but the near-term chart remains capped below resistance as analysts track larger wedge and channel patterns....

item.title: GhostApproval Symlink Flaws Could Let Malicious Repos Run Code in AI Coding Agents

item.title: AI Coding Agents Found Triggering Endpoint Security Rules Built to Catch Attackers
item.description:
Sophos looked at a week of its own endpoint data and found that AI coding agents such as Claude Code, Cursor, and OpenAI Codex are setting off detection rules written to catch human intruders.
The ag...

item.title: Public GitHub Issue Could Trick GitHub Agentic Workflows Into Leaking Private Repo Data
item.description:
A public issue can trick GitHub Agentic Workflows into leaking the contents of an organization's private repositories, researchers at Noma Security have shown.

item.title: Court Filing Reveals Windows Device ID Helped FBI Trace Alleged Scattered Spider Hacker
item.description:
